name: Brookings Institution
notes: Centrist policy think tank. Qatar funding (Brookings Doha Center) is publicly disclosed.

name: Heritage Foundation
notes: Conservative think tank. Authored Project 2025 policy framework.

name: American Enterprise Institute
notes: Free-market policy research.

name: Cato Institute
major_funders: ["Charles Koch Foundation", "Donald and Paula Smith Family Foundation", "DonorsTrust"]
notes: Libertarian think tank. Long-running Koch family backing.

name: Center for American Progress
notes: Founded by John Podesta. Closely associated with the Democratic establishment.

name: Economic Policy Institute
notes: Labor-aligned economic policy research.

name: Federalist Society
notes: Influential in conservative judicial nominations.

name: American Constitution Society
notes: Progressive counterpart to the Federalist Society.

name: Federal Communications Commission
notes: Independent U.S. agency regulating interstate communications by radio

name: Federal Trade Commission
notes: Independent U.S. agency that enforces antitrust law and protects consumers from deceptive practices.

name: Department of Justice
notes: Cabinet-level department responsible for federal law enforcement and prosecuting federal crimes.

name: Federal Bureau of Investigation
notes: Domestic intelligence and security service operating within the Department of Justice.

name: Environmental Protection Agency
notes: Independent agency tasked with environmental protection and enforcing federal pollution laws.

name: Food and Drug Administration
notes: HHS agency regulating food

name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
notes: HHS public-health agency responsible for disease control

name: Securities and Exchange Commission
notes: Independent agency regulating securities markets and enforcing federal securities laws.

name: Internal Revenue Service
notes: Treasury bureau responsible for collecting federal taxes and administering the Internal Revenue Code.

name: Department of Defense
notes: Cabinet-level executive department coordinating national security and the U.S. armed forces.

name: Department of State
notes: Cabinet-level department conducting U.S. foreign policy and managing diplomatic relations.

name: Department of the Treasury
notes: Cabinet-level department managing federal finances

name: Federal Reserve System
notes: The U.S. central banking system; sets monetary policy via the FOMC and supervises member banks.

name: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau
notes: Independent agency created post-2008 to regulate consumer-facing financial products and services.

name: National Labor Relations Board
notes: Independent agency enforcing the National Labor Relations Act and adjudicating union-employer disputes.
